overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a truck cabin in a truck simulator game, driving on a snow-covered highway during winter. The truck navigates through moderate traffic, slows to a stop behind a green tanker truck, then accelerates and continues along the snowy interstate with occasional overpasses and barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered multi-lane highway with concrete barriers

events.description: white car overtakes on the left lane

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed on the snowy highway, steering through light snow conditions

notable_agents.action: white sedan overtaking in the left lane

entered.detail: Mercedes truck dashboard with instrument cluster and GPS screen
large side mirror showing reflection of highway behind
multi-lane asphalt highway covered in snow with tire tracks visible
grey concrete highway barrier separating lanes
concrete overpass structure spanning the highway

segments.scene_description: The truck drives along a snow-covered highway with the dashboard and side mirror visible in the foreground. The vehicle passes under a concrete overpass while a white car overtakes on the left. Concrete barriers line the right side of the road and snow-covered trees are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway traffic congestion behind tanker truck

events.description: approaching green tanker truck ahead, traffic slowing
truck comes to a complete stop behind the tanker in traffic jam

agents.ego_description: slowing down and coming to a stop behind a green tanker truck due to traffic congestion ahead

notable_agents.action: green cylindrical tanker truck stopped ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: tall concrete noise barrier wall with textured surface
green directional highway sign visible above the road

segments.scene_description: The truck slows significantly as it approaches traffic congestion, eventually stopping behind a large green tanker truck. The scene shows a noise barrier wall on the right and highway signs ahead. Snow continues to fall as the vehicle waits in the traffic jam.

events.description: truck accelerates and moves past the tanker, resuming highway speed
passing under another highway overpass structure

agents.ego_description: accelerating back to cruising speed and continuing along the highway past the congestion

entered.detail: snow-covered grassy hillside sloping up from the highway
small highway distance marker sign on the right side

segments.scene_description: The truck accelerates away from the traffic congestion, passing under another overpass as it resumes highway speed. Snow-covered embankments line the right side of the road, and the green tanker is left behind. The journey continues along the wintry interstate with clear road ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it navigates a snowy highway, transitioning from steady movement into a traffic standstill before accelerating back to cruising speed. It begins with the truck passing under a concrete overpass while a white car overtakes on the left, with the dashboard and side mirror framing a view of distant snow-covered trees and concrete barriers. As the vehicle approaches congestion, the camera slows significantly and comes to a complete stop behind a large green tanker truck beneath falling snow and beside a noise barrier wall. The scene then shifts as the truck accelerates away from the jam, leaving the tanker behind and passing under another overpass. Finally, the camera resumes a steady pace along the wintry interstate, moving past snow-covered embankments toward a clear road ahead.
